testcase.name: test_04_trigger_scheduler_and_verify_pending_status

failure.message:
AssertionError: BUG: Expected step 1 status='pending_send' for manual campaign, got 'next' assert 'next' == 'pending_send'
- pending_send + next

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_manual_campaign_pending_status.py:207: in test_04_trigger_scheduler_and_verify_pending_status assert step1_status == "pending_send", \ E AssertionError: BUG: Expected step 1 status='pending_send' for manual campaign, got 'next' E assert 'next' == 'pending_send' E E - pending_send E + next

testcase.name: test_05_verify_task_created_with_pending_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Campaign task not found for contact 69b9edf8a8a8c9bcdcf2bcfa assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_manual_campaign_pending_status.py:246: in test_05_verify_task_created_with_pending_status assert campaign_task, f"Campaign task not found for contact {self.test_contact_id}" E AssertionError: Campaign task not found for contact 69b9edf8a8a8c9bcdcf2bcfa E assert None

testcase.name: test_07_complete_task_and_verify_sent_status

failure.message: AssertionError: Campaign task not found assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_manual_campaign_pending_status.py:351: in test_07_complete_task_and_verify_sent_status assert campaign_task, "Campaign task not found" E AssertionError: Campaign task not found E assert None

testcase.name: test_08_full_flow_end_to_end

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 'pending_send', got 'next' assert 'next' == 'pending_send'
- pending_send + next

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_manual_campaign_pending_status.py:442: in test_08_full_flow_end_to_end assert step1_status == "pending_send", f"Expected 'pending_send', got '{step1_status}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'pending_send', got 'next' E assert 'next' == 'pending_send' E E - pending_send E + next
